Letra_cifra:
(intro 2x) G5 C5(9) Em7 C5(9)

G5                  C5(9)
  All this feels strange and untrue
         Em7                     C5(9)
  And I won't waste a minute without you
G5                C5(9)
  My bones ache, my skin feels cold
           Em7                    C5(9)
  And I'm getting so tired and so old
G5            C5(9)
  The anger swells in my guts
         Em7                         C5(9)
  And I won't feel these slices and cuts
G5                  C5(9)
  I want so much to open your eyes
         Em7                   C5(9)
  Cos I need you to look into mine

G5                      C5(9)
  Tell me that you'll open your eyes
Em7                   C5(9)
  Tell me that you'll open your eyes (2x)

G5                       C5(9)
  Get up, get out, get away from these liars
            Em7                         C5(9)
  Cos they don't get your soul or your fire
G5                         C5(9)
  Take my hand, knot your fingers through mine
             Em7                              C5(9)
  And we'll walk from this dark room for the last time

G5                    C5(9)
  Every minute from this minute now
          Em7                 C5(9)
  We can do what we like anywhere
G5                  C5(9)
  I want so much to open your eyes
         Em7                   C5(9)
  Cos I need you to look into mine

G5                      C5(9)
  Tell me that you'll open your eyes
Em7                   C5(9)
  Tell me that you'll open your eyes (2x) (4x)

(solo 6x) G5 C5(9) Em7 C5(9)

G5                  C5(9)
  All this feels strange and untrue
         Em7                     C5(9)
  And I won't waste a minute without you
Compositor: Gary Lightbody / Jonny Quinn / Nathan Connolly / Paul Wilson / Tom Simpson. Esta informação está errada? Nos avise.
